en: I don't recall what I got for my first
Christmas I don't know when I went on my
first outdoor picnic but I do remember
the first time I heard sweetest voice I
had never seen anything so beautiful in
my life she was like an angel
[Music]
what's wrong with your wallet I'm
nothing at all thank you my wigs are
just fine and dandy I just sat next to
hell on that bus and had a conversation
all the way to school mama no one ever
talked to me or asked me questions I
ain't stupid or something
promises to be exist if it does I'm
Jenny I'm Forrest Forrest Gump from that

she taught me how to climb I showed her
how to die angle

she helped me learn how to read and I
showed her how to slang sometimes we
